  "findings": [
    "Back-graded drain piping section identified during puddle test",
    "Failure to maintain minimum required slope for gravity drainage"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-hang and adjust the slope of the affected piping section to ensure positive grade toward the discharge",
    "Re-test the line to confirm no standing water or back-grading remains before closeout"
  ],
  "rationale": "A back-graded section of drain piping violates IPC Section 704, which requires gravity drainage piping to be installed in alignment and at a uniform slope of not less than the minimum required pitch to prevent blockages and standing water.",

    "IPC 704",
    "IPC 704.1"
  ]
